title: Trump says Iran's handling of Strait of Hormuz is 'not the agreement we have'
description: The US president accused Iran of "doing a very poor job" with the waterway as Israel and Lebanon to begin peace talks.
content:
US President Donald Trump has accused Iran of doing a "very poor job" in its handling of oil passing through the pivotal Strait of Hormuz, arguing it was "not the agreement we have".
The comments reflect the fragile nature of the ceasefire agreement,... [5431 chars]

title: X Factor star Chico Slimani found guilty of drink-driving by London court
description: Singer, 55, said he had broken his sobriety after three ‘devastating’ bereavements and has not drunk alcohol since
content:
Chico Slimani, a memorable X Factor contestant, was found guilty of drink-driving on Thursday, telling the court his arrest came hours after he broke his sobriety.

title: Weekend students at 15 universities in England told to return loans and grants
description: Student Finance England tells about 22,000 students their universities wrongly told them they were eligible
content: More than 20,000 university students in England who received government maintenance loans and grants worth thousands of pounds have been told they will have to pay them back because their universities wrongly told them they were eligible for the mone... [4070 chars]

title: Sadiq Khan demands stronger action on social media ‘outrage economy’
description: Mayor says disinformation, including about London crime rates, is ‘eating away at basic bonds of trust’
content:
Sadiq Khan has called on ministers to take significantly stronger action against social media companies that spread disinformation after a study showed a surge in hostile accounts posting falsehoods about London’s crime rates and integration.

description: Only minutes after Joe O’Shea landed a memorable big hunter chase double, the larger-than-life character declared he had a horse even better than his... Read More
content:
